/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/TN:BAYRON TURCIOS/MO138572:18015853 AND 19003698/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY STAY AWAY ORDERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 18015853,/
/CAL:ACM ELIG RPT/INTC/ACM/SA2:UNITED NATIONS PLZ, INTERSECTION OF MCALLISTER AND HYDE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:90 MINUTES/
/CAL:I&A, P&C/INTC/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:10-19-20/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/INTC/BWR: 07-27-20/BWR1//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT HAS A CURFEW & SHALL NOT BEOUT FROM 7PM TO 7AM/RX/NALC/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANTSHALL STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM UN PLAZA, SF CA/TWA/CONTD:I&A, P&C/DOP/
/CAL:TS PRELIM HR AND SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/INTC/CTORD:WARRANT DISCHARGED/X:DEFENSE REQUESTS ACM ICR,/CONTD:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP
